response.justification: Bogdan brings highly relevant and rare experience in building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, perfectly aligning with the role's AI-native baseline. He also possesses proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems, having handled millions of requests per second in previous roles. Although he lacks the required strong Python background, his deep polyglot systems experience and software craftsmanship make him a highly adaptable and strong Staff-level candidate.
strengths: Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby).
Strong software craftsmanship mindset with deep experience in TDD, CI/CD, and agile methodologies.
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with Python, which is listed as a must-have technical skill.
Resume shows a history of relatively short tenures across multiple companies.
No explicit mention of operational ownership regarding out-of-hours on-call rotations or formal incident response.
